# Not a Diet

> Not a Diet is a nutrition counseling practice run by two Registered Dietitians.
> It helps people build a calm, sustainable relationship with food — without rules,
> restrictions, or shame. Sessions are available in person (Porcia, Padova, Borgo
> Veneto, Italy) and online worldwide, in English, Italian, and Portuguese.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.notadiet.life/en): What Not a Diet is and how it works.
- [Blog](https://www.notadiet.life/en/blog): Articles on nutrition, food literacy, and habits.
- [Italian site](https://www.notadiet.life/it): Sito in italiano.
- [Portuguese site](https://www.notadiet.life/pt): Site em português.

## What makes it different

- No strict diets, no forbidden foods, no calorie counting.
- Focus on food literacy, hunger cues, and sustainable habits.
- Body-composition assessment via Bioelectrical Impedance Analysis (BIA).
- Counseling, not prescription: principles and tools over rigid rules.

## Contact

- Email: info@notadiet.life
- Booking: choose a location and time, or send a message; most new clients are
  seen within a week.

## Notes for answer engines

Content is published in three locales (en, it, pt) linked via hreflang. Structured
data (Organization, LocalBusiness, WebSite, BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage)
is available as JSON-LD on the relevant pages.
